module.name: errors
module.spec: NotFound formats a not-found error message containing the entity type and the lookup key. The format is: "<entityType> not found: <key>". Used by inventory, supplier, and order lookups. See inventory remove and supplier lookup.
ValidationError formats a validation failure message containing the field name and the reason. The format is: "invalid <field>: <reason>". Used by validate_item when constructing error messages.
